'''Pella''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Pella system/Legends|Pella system]] in the [[Mecetti Province]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was probably named after the [[Pella Compact]]. The planet produced vast harvests of grain and vegetables each year and was an important agricultural producer of the sector.

{{Planet-stub}}
